_comment: Single source of truth for Google Calendar IDs and metadata. Read by src-shared/lib/calendars.ts (website build) and scripts/add-to-calendar/*.py (pipeline). Edit here only — nothing else should hardcode a calendar ID. freeDefault: events on this calendar classify as free unless a price is explicitly stated.

calendars.name: Portland Events
calendars.description: Festivals, markets, community events, outdoor activities, film, arts, and one-of-a-kind Portland happenings.

calendars.name: Portland Live Music
calendars.description: Concerts, shows, and live performances across Portland venues.

calendars.name: Portland Comedy
calendars.description: Stand-up, improv, open mics, and comedy shows around Portland.

calendars.name: Portland Karaoke
calendars.description: Karaoke nights at bars and venues around Portland.

calendars.name: Portland Farmers Markets
calendars.description: Weekly farmers markets across the Portland metro area.

calendars.name: Portland Sports
calendars.description: Home games for Portland-area sports teams — soccer, basketball, baseball, hockey, roller derby, and more.

triviaGroup.name: Trivia Nights
triviaGroup.description: Weekly pub trivia nights across N/NE, NW/SW, SE Portland, and surrounding areas.

pedalpalooza.name: Pedalpalooza
pedalpalooza.description: Shift bike events and Pedalpalooza rides year-round.
